history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, medium shot of an anime-style young man with short, messy black hair and bright, wide-open eyes. He has a large, joyful smile, showing his teeth and a pink tongue. His skin is pale, and he has prominent dark outlines around his features, typical of cel-shaded anime. He is wearing a patterned shirt with geometric designs in red, blue, and white, layered under a light beige jacket or coat. The background is dimly lit and appears to be an indoor setting, possibly a room, with muted green walls and dark, indistinct furniture or objects. The lighting is dramatic, casting strong shadows on his face and neck, creating a sense of depth and highlighting his expression. The overall mood is cheerful and energetic, conveyed through his exuberant smile and the dynamic animation style. The color palette is dominated by dark tones in the background, contrasted with the lighter shades of his skin and clothing, and the vibrant colors of his shirt.
